name: neewe
description: NEEWE Framework — 8-layer Claude Code AI-assisted development system. Opus plans, Sonnet executes.

plugins.name: neewe-core
plugins.description: NEEWE umbrella plugin — skills, agents, hooks, MCP, governance trio, MNEME memory, Goal Mode, Dashboard

plugins.name: neewe-stack-nextjs
plugins.description: NEEWE stack-flavor satellite for Next.js (App Router + RSC). LSP + monitors + 5-axis pattern skills.

plugins.name: neewe-stack-fastapi
plugins.description: NEEWE stack-flavor satellite for FastAPI (async Python). LSP + monitors + 5-axis pattern skills.

plugins.name: neewe-stack-django
plugins.description: NEEWE stack-flavor satellite for Django (4.2+ / 5.x). LSP + monitors + 5-axis pattern skills.

plugins.name: neewe-enterprise-governance
plugins.description: NEEWE enterprise overlay — strict managed marketplaces, audit pipes, provenance bonds (EP-OPUS-12), compliance profiles (LGPD/SOC2/HIPAA/PCI).
